text: Never provision this project's backend objects (tables, RPCs, edge functions) inside an existing/unrelated Supabase project, even prefixed and flagged reversible — the owner ruled the 'insurance' project strictly off-limits and required a full teardown on 2026-07-10. If no dedicated project slot exists, STOP and ask the owner (free a slot / upgrade); never fall back to a shared project. Any resource-scope decision outside this repo needs explicit owner approval BEFORE proceeding.

The Claude Code Remote MCP server registers as BOTH mcp__Claude_Code_Remote__* and mcp__claude-code-remote__* depending on surface — allowlist rules must cover both spellings (PR #50). Observed in the 2026-07-13 session: permissions.allow appears SNAPSHOTTED at session start — after PR #30 merged mid-session and the file was present in the working tree with the exactly-matching rule, send_later still prompted for the rest of that session. Whether /refresh-repo can force a reload is UNVERIFIED; assume a new session is needed until someone tests it (test: pull main in a running session, fire send_later, see if it prompts).
